name: package-managers
description: Structured combined package manager definitions from SetupX and docker-choco-installer

chocolatey.name: chocolatey
chocolatey.description: Combined package manager definition for Chocolatey

commands.install: if (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco --version } else { Set-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Scope Process -Force; [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [System.Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; Invoke-Expression ((New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://community.chocolatey.org/install.ps1')) }
commands.check: choco --version
commands.test: choco --version

scoop.name: scoop
scoop.description: Combined package manager definition for Scoop

commands.install: if (Get-Command scoop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { scoop --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\scoop\shims\scoop.cmd") { & "$env:USERPROFILE\scoop\shims\scoop.cmd" --version } else { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri https://get.scoop.sh | Invoke-Expression }
commands.update: if (Get-Command scoop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { scoop update } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\scoop\shims\scoop.cmd") { & "$env:USERPROFILE\scoop\shims\scoop.cmd" update } else { Write-Host 'scoop not available for update' }
commands.check: if (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\scoop\shims\scoop.cmd") { Write-Host 'scoop-found' } elseif (Get-Command scoop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'scoop-command-found' } else { throw 'scoop not found' }
commands.test: if (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\scoop\shims\scoop.cmd") { Write-Host 'scoop-found' } elseif (Get-Command scoop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'scoop-command-found' } else { throw 'scoop not found' }
commands.remove: if (Get-Command scoop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { scoop uninstall scoop } else { Write-Host 'scoop not found' }

winget.name: winget
winget.description: Combined package manager definition for Winget

commands.install: if (Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { winget --version } elseif ([int](Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).BuildNumber -lt 18362) { Write-Host 'winget unsupported on this Windows build; skipping install'; } elseif (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco install winget-cli -y --no-progress } else { throw 'winget is not installed and Chocolatey is unavailable to install winget-cli' }
commands.update: if ([int](Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).BuildNumber -lt 18362) { Write-Host 'winget unsupported on this Windows build; skipping update'; } else { winget upgrade --all --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity }
commands.check: if ([int](Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).BuildNumber -lt 18362) { Write-Host 'winget unsupported on this Windows build; skipping check'; } else { winget --version }
commands.test: if ([int](Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).BuildNumber -lt 18362) { Write-Host 'winget unsupported on this Windows build; skipping check'; } else { winget --version }
commands.remove: Write-Host 'winget is managed by App Installer; remove App Installer to remove winget.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

nvm.name: nvm
nvm.description: Node Version Manager (Windows) to manage multiple Node.js versions

commands.install: if (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco install nvm -y } else { Write-Host 'Chocolatey not found. Installing NVM from Chocolatey requires choco. Please install Chocolatey first or install NVM manually.' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $global:LASTEXITCODE = 1 }
commands.remove: if (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco uninstall nvm -y }
commands.update: if (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco upgrade nvm -y }
commands.check: if (Get-Command nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { 1 } else { 0 }
commands.test: nvm list

nodejs.name: nodejs
nodejs.description: JavaScript runtime (from NVM if available, otherwise LTS via Chocolatey)

commands.install: if (Get-Command nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { nvm install lts; nvm use lts } elseif (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco install nodejs-lts -y } else { Write-Host 'Neither NVM nor Chocolatey available to install Node.js' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $global:LASTEXITCODE = 1 }
commands.remove: if (Get-Command nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'Use nvm to uninstall specific Node versions (e.g., nvm uninstall <version>)' -ForegroundColor Yellow } elseif (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco uninstall nodejs-lts -y }
commands.update: if (Get-Command nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { nvm install lts; nvm use lts } elseif (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco upgrade nodejs-lts -y }
commands.check: (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count | Where-Object { $_ -gt 0 }
commands.test: node --version

nuget.name: nuget
nuget.description: Combined package manager definition for Nuget

commands.check: if (Get-Command nuget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { nuget help | Out-Null } elseif (((choco list --local-only --exact nuget.commandline 2>$null) -match '^nuget\.commandline\|').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'nuget-installed' } else { throw 'nuget not found' }
commands.verify: if (Get-Command nuget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { nuget help | Out-Null } elseif (((choco list --local-only --exact nuget.commandline 2>$null) -match '^nuget\.commandline\|').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'nuget-installed' } else { throw 'nuget not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command nuget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { nuget help | Out-Null } elseif (((choco list --local-only --exact nuget.commandline 2>$null) -match '^nuget\.commandline\|').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'nuget-installed' } else { throw 'nuget not found' }

dotnet-tool.name: dotnet-tool
dotnet-tool.description: Combined package manager definition for Dotnet Tool

commands.check: if (Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { dotnet --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\dotnet\dotnet.exe") { Write-Host 'dotnet-found' } elseif (((choco list --local-only --exact dotnet-sdk 2>$null) -match '^dotnet-sdk\|').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'dotnet-sdk-installed' } else { throw 'dotnet not found' }
commands.verify: if (Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { dotnet --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\dotnet\dotnet.exe") { Write-Host 'dotnet-found' } elseif (((choco list --local-only --exact dotnet-sdk 2>$null) -match '^dotnet-sdk\|').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'dotnet-sdk-installed' } else { throw 'dotnet not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { dotnet --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\dotnet\dotnet.exe") { Write-Host 'dotnet-found' } elseif (((choco list --local-only --exact dotnet-sdk 2>$null) -match '^dotnet-sdk\|').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'dotnet-sdk-installed' } else { throw 'dotnet not found' }

vcpkg.name: vcpkg
vcpkg.description: Combined package manager definition for Vcpkg

commands.install: $vcpkgCmd = Get-Command vcpkg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($vcpkgCmd) { Write-Host 'vcpkg-command-found' } elseif ((Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -and ([int](Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).BuildNumber -ge 18362)) { winget install --id Microsoft.Vcpkg -e --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity } elseif (Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $vcpkgRoot = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'vcpkg'; if (-not (Test-Path $vcpkgRoot)) { git clone https://github.com/microsoft/vcpkg $vcpkgRoot }; & (Join-Path $vcpkgRoot 'bootstrap-vcpkg.bat') -disableMetrics; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $vcpkgRoot 'vcpkg.exe')) { $env:Path += ';' + $vcpkgRoot } else { throw 'vcpkg bootstrap failed' } } elseif (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco install vcpkg -y --no-progress } else { throw 'No supported installer found for vcpkg' }
commands.update: $vcpkgCmd = Get-Command vcpkg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($vcpkgCmd) { & $vcpkgCmd.Source update } elseif (Test-Path (Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'vcpkg\vcpkg.exe')) { & (Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'vcpkg\vcpkg.exe') update } elseif ((Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -and ([int](Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).BuildNumber -ge 18362)) { winget upgrade --id Microsoft.Vcpkg -e --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity } else { throw 'vcpkg not found for update' }
commands.check: if (Get-Command vcpkg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'vcpkg-command-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\vcpkg\vcpkg.exe") { Write-Host 'vcpkg-local-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\vcpkg\vcpkg.exe") { Write-Host 'vcpkg-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\vcpkg.exe") { Write-Host 'vcpkg-found' } elseif ((Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'vcpkg*' } | Select-Object -First 1)) { Write-Host 'vcpkg-installed' } else { throw 'vcpkg not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command vcpkg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'vcpkg-command-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\vcpkg\vcpkg.exe") { Write-Host 'vcpkg-local-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\vcpkg\vcpkg.exe") { Write-Host 'vcpkg-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\vcpkg.exe") { Write-Host 'vcpkg-found' } elseif ((Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'vcpkg*' } | Select-Object -First 1)) { Write-Host 'vcpkg-installed' } else { throw 'vcpkg not found' }
commands.remove: if (Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { winget uninstall --id Microsoft.Vcpkg -e --disable-interactivity --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements } elseif (Test-Path (Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'vcpkg')) { Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'vcpkg') -Recurse -Force } elseif (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco uninstall vcpkg -y --no-progress } else { Write-Host 'vcpkg not found' }

pipx.name: pipx
pipx.description: Combined package manager definition for Pipx

commands.install: python -m pip install --user pipx; python -m pipx ensurepath
commands.check: if (Get-Command pipx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pipx --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.local\bin\pipx.exe") { Write-Host 'pipx-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\Python\Python311\Scripts\pipx.exe") { Write-Host 'pipx-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\Python\Python314\Scripts\pipx.exe") { Write-Host 'pipx-found' } elseif (((python -m pip show pipx 2>$null | Out-String).Trim().Length -gt 0)) { Write-Host 'pipx-installed' } else { throw 'pipx not found' }
commands.verify: if (Get-Command pipx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pipx --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.local\bin\pipx.exe") { Write-Host 'pipx-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\Python\Python311\Scripts\pipx.exe") { Write-Host 'pipx-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\Python\Python314\Scripts\pipx.exe") { Write-Host 'pipx-found' } elseif (((python -m pip show pipx 2>$null | Out-String).Trim().Length -gt 0)) { Write-Host 'pipx-installed' } else { throw 'pipx not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command pipx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pipx --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.local\bin\pipx.exe") { Write-Host 'pipx-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\Python\Python311\Scripts\pipx.exe") { Write-Host 'pipx-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\Python\Python314\Scripts\pipx.exe") { Write-Host 'pipx-found' } elseif (((python -m pip show pipx 2>$null | Out-String).Trim().Length -gt 0)) { Write-Host 'pipx-installed' } else { throw 'pipx not found' }

npm.name: npm
npm.description: Combined package manager definition for Npm

commands.install: if (Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { npm --version } elseif (Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { winget install -e --id OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity } elseif (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco install nodejs-lts -y --no-progress } else { throw 'npm requires Node.js and no supported installer (winget/choco) is available' }
commands.check: npm --version
commands.test: npm --version
commands.remove: Write-Host 'npm is bundled with Node.js. Remove Node.js to remove npm.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

yarn.name: yarn
yarn.description: Combined package manager definition for Yarn

commands.check: if (Get-Command yarn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { yarn --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\npm\yarn.cmd") { Write-Host 'yarn-found' } elseif (((npm list -g --depth=0 yarn 2>$null | Out-String) -match ' yarn@').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'yarn-installed' } else { throw 'yarn not found' }
commands.verify: if (Get-Command yarn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { yarn --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\npm\yarn.cmd") { Write-Host 'yarn-found' } elseif (((npm list -g --depth=0 yarn 2>$null | Out-String) -match ' yarn@').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'yarn-installed' } else { throw 'yarn not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command yarn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { yarn --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\npm\yarn.cmd") { Write-Host 'yarn-found' } elseif (((npm list -g --depth=0 yarn 2>$null | Out-String) -match ' yarn@').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'yarn-installed' } else { throw 'yarn not found' }

pnpm.name: pnpm
pnpm.description: Combined package manager definition for Pnpm

commands.check: if (Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pnpm --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\npm\pnpm.cmd") { Write-Host 'pnpm-found' } elseif (((npm list -g --depth=0 pnpm 2>$null | Out-String) -match ' pnpm@').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'pnpm-installed' } else { throw 'pnpm not found' }
commands.verify: if (Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pnpm --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\npm\pnpm.cmd") { Write-Host 'pnpm-found' } elseif (((npm list -g --depth=0 pnpm 2>$null | Out-String) -match ' pnpm@').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'pnpm-installed' } else { throw 'pnpm not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pnpm --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\npm\pnpm.cmd") { Write-Host 'pnpm-found' } elseif (((npm list -g --depth=0 pnpm 2>$null | Out-String) -match ' pnpm@').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'pnpm-installed' } else { throw 'pnpm not found' }

bun.name: bun
bun.description: Combined package manager definition for Bun

commands.check: bun --version
commands.test: bun --version

cargo.name: cargo
cargo.description: Combined package manager definition for Cargo

commands.check: if (Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'cargo-command-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.cargo\bin\cargo.exe") { Write-Host 'cargo-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\rustup.install") { Write-Host 'rustup-installed' } else { throw 'cargo not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'cargo-command-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.cargo\bin\cargo.exe") { Write-Host 'cargo-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\rustup.install") { Write-Host 'rustup-installed' } else { throw 'cargo not found' }

go.name: go
go.description: Combined package manager definition for Go

commands.check: if (Get-Command go -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { go version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\Go\bin\go.exe") { Write-Host 'go-found' } elseif (((choco list --local-only --exact golang 2>$null) -match '^golang\|').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'golang-installed' } else { throw 'go not found' }
commands.verify: if (Get-Command go -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { go version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\Go\bin\go.exe") { Write-Host 'go-found' } elseif (((choco list --local-only --exact golang 2>$null) -match '^golang\|').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'golang-installed' } else { throw 'go not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command go -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { go version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\Go\bin\go.exe") { Write-Host 'go-found' } elseif (((choco list --local-only --exact golang 2>$null) -match '^golang\|').Length -gt 0) { Write-Host 'golang-installed' } else { throw 'go not found' }

composer.name: composer
composer.description: Combined package manager definition for Composer

commands.check: if (Get-Command composer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'composer-command-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\composer.bat") { Write-Host 'composer-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\composer") { Write-Host 'composer-installed' } else { throw 'composer not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command composer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'composer-command-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\composer.bat") { Write-Host 'composer-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\composer") { Write-Host 'composer-installed' } else { throw 'composer not found' }

gem.name: gem
gem.description: Combined package manager definition for Gem

commands.check: if (Get-Command gem -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'gem-command-found' } elseif ((Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'Ruby*' } | ForEach-Object { Join-Path $_.FullName 'bin\gem.bat' } | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1)) { Write-Host 'gem-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\ruby") { Write-Host 'ruby-installed' } else { throw 'gem not found' }
commands.verify: ([bool](Get-Command gem -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) -or ((Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'Ruby*' } | ForEach-Object { Join-Path $_.FullName 'bin\gem.bat' } | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1) -ne $null)
commands.test: if (Get-Command gem -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'gem-command-found' } elseif ((Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'Ruby*' } | ForEach-Object { Join-Path $_.FullName 'bin\gem.bat' } | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1)) { Write-Host 'gem-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\ruby") { Write-Host 'ruby-installed' } else { throw 'gem not found' }

conda.name: conda
conda.description: Combined package manager definition for Conda

commands.check: if (Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'conda-command-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { Write-Host 'conda-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { Write-Host 'conda-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { Write-Host 'conda-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\miniconda3") { Write-Host 'miniconda3-installed' } else { throw 'conda not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'conda-command-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { Write-Host 'conda-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { Write-Host 'conda-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { Write-Host 'conda-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\miniconda3") { Write-Host 'miniconda3-installed' } else { throw 'conda not found' }

mamba.name: mamba
mamba.description: Combined package manager definition for Mamba

commands.install: $condaExe = $null; if (Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $condaExe = 'conda' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" }; if (-not $condaExe) { if (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { choco install miniconda3 -y --no-progress }; if (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" } }; if ($condaExe) { & $condaExe install mamba -n base -c conda-forge -y --freeze-installed } else { throw 'conda not found for mamba install' }
commands.update: $condaExe = $null; if (Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $condaExe = 'conda' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" }; if ($condaExe) { & $condaExe update mamba -n base -c conda-forge -y --freeze-installed } else { throw 'conda not found for mamba update' }
commands.check: if (Get-Command mamba -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'mamba-command-found' } elseif (Get-Command micromamba -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'micromamba-command-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\mamba.exe") { Write-Host 'mamba-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\mamba.exe") { Write-Host 'mamba-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\mamba.exe") { Write-Host 'mamba-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\micromamba.exe") { Write-Host 'micromamba-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\micromamba") { Write-Host 'micromamba-installed' } elseif (Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'conda-available-mamba-optional' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { Write-Host 'conda-available-mamba-optional' } else { throw 'mamba not found' }
commands.verify: (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\mamba.exe") -or (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\mamba.exe") -or (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\mamba.exe") -or (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\micromamba.exe") -or [bool](Get-Command mamba -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -or [bool](Get-Command micromamba -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -or (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\micromamba") -or [bool](Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -or (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe")
commands.test: if (Get-Command mamba -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'mamba-command-found' } elseif (Get-Command micromamba -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'micromamba-command-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\mamba.exe") { Write-Host 'mamba-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\mamba.exe") { Write-Host 'mamba-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\mamba.exe") { Write-Host 'mamba-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\micromamba.exe") { Write-Host 'micromamba-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\micromamba") { Write-Host 'micromamba-installed' } elseif (Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'conda-available-mamba-optional' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { Write-Host 'conda-available-mamba-optional' } else { throw 'mamba not found' }
commands.remove: $condaExe = $null; if (Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $condaExe = 'conda' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:ProgramData\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:USERPROFILE\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe") { $condaExe = "$env:SystemDrive\tools\miniconda3\Scripts\conda.exe" }; if ($condaExe) { & $condaExe remove mamba -n base -y } else { Write-Host 'mamba not found' }

pip.name: pip
pip.description: Combined package manager definition for Pip

commands.check: if (Get-Command pip -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pip --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\Python311\Scripts\pip.exe") { Write-Host 'pip-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:PythonHome\Scripts\pip.exe") { Write-Host 'pip-found' } else { throw 'pip not found' }
commands.verify: if (Get-Command pip -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pip --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\Python311\Scripts\pip.exe") { Write-Host 'pip-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:PythonHome\Scripts\pip.exe") { Write-Host 'pip-found' } else { throw 'pip not found' }
commands.test: if (Get-Command pip -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pip --version } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\Python311\Scripts\pip.exe") { Write-Host 'pip-found' } elseif (Test-Path "$env:PythonHome\Scripts\pip.exe") { Write-Host 'pip-found' } else { throw 'pip not found' }
commands.remove: Write-Host 'pip is bundled with Python. Remove Python to remove pip.' -ForegroundColor Yellow
